args:
set -eu
bundle_dir=$(mktemp -d)
if cargo run --quiet --bin sock -- prepare decode-path --out "$bundle_dir" >"$bundle_dir/stdout.txt" 2>"$bundle_dir/stderr.txt"; then
  echo 'decode-path prepare unexpectedly succeeded' >&2
  exit 1
fi
grep -q 'compile-region:decode_attention' "$bundle_dir/stderr.txt"
grep -q 'Full worker startup context' "$bundle_dir/stderr.txt"
printf 'prepare-decode-fail-closed\n'
